description: ol-not-a-place (issue #79): the reporter `first` used as an assignment target (`first :x = 5`) is not an assignable place. The parser recognizes the assignment structurally so the semantic checker can flag the non-place target at stage=semantic, with the callee name carried as the optional `text` param (spec/error-model.md, spec/grammar.md:258). This covers only the syntactic reporter/call-as-target case; deeper name-resolution non-place cases belong to #113.
